title: Sidecar schema redesign — kill field duplication, single source of truth per field
description: The .meta/<uuid>.json sidecars are duplicated and inconsistent (surfaced during MPI-112). Same data stored 2-3x with sometimes DISAGREEING values: (1) ratioLabel (top-level) vs generationSettings.injectionParams.Ratio_Label; (2) pixelDimensions vs injectionParams.Width/Height; (3) top-level fps/duration/frameCount/hasAudio vs videoMeta.{...} (exact copy); (4) startFrame media stored in generationSettings.mediaItems AND previewAssets.snapshots; (5) generationSettings.modelSettings.operations is ALWAYS {} (per-op UI state never written there — shared controls live in project.shared.video, never captured in the sidecar at all). Worse: a single video gen saved project.shared.video.ratioSelector.qualityTier='very_low' while injectionParams.Width/Height=368x640='low' tier — the two quality sources disagree within one item. INVESTIGATE FIRST: map every sidecar field, its writer (save-generation / crop / upload / extend / reconciler / projectModel defaults), every reader (gallery, history, reuse), and which duplicates are deliberate (per integrity doc: videoMeta=raw probe, previewAssets=durable snapshots) vs accidental. Then design a clean schema with ONE source per field + a migration for existing projects. MUST be patched into master too (no users yet, per Fabio 2026-06-18). Likely regressed when the combined image/video model was split into two video models — that change skipped re-implementing the per-op settings persistence into the sidecar. Reference: docs/project-integrity.md, js/services/generationService.js (generationSettings build ~line 630), routes/projects.js (save-generation, materialize*), js/utils/promptReuse.js (reuse readers). See brief.md.
